statusLine.command: cols=$(stty size </dev/tty 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}'); export COLUMNS=$(( ${cols:-120} > 4 ? ${cols:-120} - 4 : 1 )); exec node "$HOME/.claude-hud/dist/index.js"

hooks.command: fp=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); base=$(basename "$fp"); if echo "$base" | grep -qE '^\.(env|npmrc|yarnrc)'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Blocked: reading .env* / .npmrc* / .yarnrc* files is not allowed — use environment variables directly"}'; exit 0; fi; echo '{"decision": "allow"}'
